title: Trying to run PLI program, "thunker register" issues
body:
So I have a basic verilog module and I compiled without issues the verilog PLI C progarm which registers callbacks and scans for ports. both verilog rtl and C compile OK, however when I run it I see:

```
$ vvp -mcadpli dut_top -cadpli=../vip/build/libvpi.vpi.so                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
vvp: cadpli.c:50: thunker_register: Assertion `bp' failed.
Aborted    
```

it doesnt say much about where should I look for, any hints?
code_blocks:
$ vvp -mcadpli dut_top -cadpli=../vip/build/libvpi.vpi.so                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
vvp: cadpli.c:50: thunker_register: Assertion `bp' failed.
Aborted
